title: 6 Pack Qtip Dispenser Apothecary Jars Bathroom with Labels - Qtip Holder Storage Canister Clear Plastic Acrylic Jar for Cotton Ball,Cotton Swab,Cotton Rounds,Floss Picks, Hair Clips (Clear)
description:
About this item
✅CUTE AND FUNCTIONAL - The clear acrylic apothecary jars combine BEAUTY with organization,going perfect for the modern farmhouse look you’re looking for in the bathroom. A rounded base provides plenty of room for storing bathroom essentials such as cotton swabs, qtips, cotton balls, cotton rounds, floss picks,lipsticks,hair ties, hair clips etc and is easily wiped clean with soap and water.
✅PERFECT SIZE ADN EASY TO USE- Perfectly sized for storing q-tips,cotton rounds or any miscellaneous bathroom things in the bathroom. Each apothecary jar has a removable acrylic lid and a wide mouth to make accessing bathroom necessities and accessories simple.Lid fits well,not too loose or too snug,easy to set the Q-Tips perfectly in the dispenser and easy to get them out.
✅MAKING HOME A BETTER SPACE - The canisters are also clear plastic jar, modern design, functional yet decorative,not just for the bathroom, also PERFECT in the kitchen, bedroom or craft room.Especially perfect to use in some narrow space, such as floating shelves, tiny bathroom vanity or countertop.
✅DURABLE - The small apothecary jars are durable,looks like glass but WILL NOT SHATTER.Acrylic construction means you don't have to worry about broken glass if it gets dropped or knocked off the counter. Package includes : 3 pack 12oz + 3 pack 10oz canisters
✅SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - If you have any questions, please contact us in time, we will solve it properly for you within 24 hours.Enjoy the shopping, enjoy the better lifestyle with our qtip holder.
reviews_5s:
I am really happy with this 6 pack bathroom jar set. The jars can be opened easily, and the lids ensure that the contents remain free from dust and hair. The size of the jars is perfect, accommodating a variety of small bathroom products as shown in the attached photos. Additionally, the item is very well priced for what you get, offering excellent value.

The sleek and transparent design fits seamlessly into any bathroom decor, and the durable material ensures longevity. These jars have helped me organize my bathroom efficiently, keeping everything neat and accessible. Highly recommend this set for anyone looking to enhance their bathroom storage in a stylish and practical way!Plastic material because kids would break the glass. I was surprised its two different sizes but they stores alot in both. Very clean look.I love using these in my guest bath to hold some nice items for people to use. These are plastic which was a must for me with little kids. This way I know they won’t break. They still look nice and the lid goes on great! You can fit quite a bit of things in them. They wash well in the dishwasher and are very lightweight. No need to do any assembly, just wash and fill with the items that you would like.The containers are on the small side, but they are nice.I absolutely adore my collection of storage jars. In my bathroom, I use them to neatly organize an array of essentials, including cotton swabs, floss picks, hair ties, and even my disposable contact lenses. What sets these jars apart is their user-friendly lightweight lids. These lids are incredibly easy to remove and replace, effectively keeping dust at bay and thwarting my cat's playful attempts to pilfer my hair ties!

I rated this product with four stars for sturdiness and durability because, although it has performed well thus far, it's worth noting that it's made of lightweight acrylic. It may be prone to breakage if subjected to a significant impact or a hard drop.Bought these for my new house and they work great! Small and clear. Each holds the right amount of necessities for a bathroom, such as q-tips, cotton balls, etc. They seems durable enough for the job.Nice but be aware thst half of these nest inside the other half, so they are not all the same size. I did not catch that in the description.These are perfect for organizing my small items in the bathroom.Very nice and have held up well.These are very nice. I’m happy with them.
reviews_1s:
Only three full set arrived and three extra tops but I purchased the set of 6 box! The pictures are self explanatory also the qualities are very poor. I don’t recommend. I will be returning them.I should have examined the image better I guess. Was disappointed that the lids did not overlap the sides
of the cylinder for easy off. You can not just grab the top and open it once it is in place. Requires holding the bottom jar while pulling the lid off. If you aren't bothered about that feature then you will probably love it.
Also are rather on the small size too.Jars are too small to store anything. Cheap plastic and not worth itSorry I purchased this and wasted my money. Ended up throwing them awayReceived cracked lidEvery top of these containers had a crack like through them. Shipping Box was sturdy and all so not sure how this happened. Very delicate plastic jars so beware.I wanted something larger than the standard 10 oz size but also that would fit in my shelf rack. These are so tiny as to be ridiculous. They will not hold an entire soft drink can, which is 12 oz. From what was left over, I suspect they are probably only 8-9 oz. Amazon is making me put 1 star but they are really 0 if you actually want a 12 oz size.The lids are cracked right in the middle and the labels came in folded in half. The size is smaller also from previous / old ones and more expensive. I would not recommend this seller / product.These are super cute and the quality seems good. However, there was a lid missing and it did not come with the labels.Not Sturdy Plastic, looks very cheap. Would not recommend.
